div.head: 241. National Security Council Record of Action No. 2444Source: Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Meetings and Memoranda Series, National Security Council Meetings, 1961, No. 494. Secret. Taken at the 494th meeting on December 5; see Document 240.
div.p: Discussed the recommendation of the Secretary of State that the U.S. proceed with the project as summarized in a paper entitled, “The Volta River Project,” dated December 5, 1961.See footnote 1, Document 240.
Noted that the President would defer his decision pending a report to be prepared by the Department of State and the Attorney General on legal aspects of the project.
